definition: China's preferred term for LLMs. Literally 'big model'. Used for both open and closed models.
example: 百度发布了新的大模型。

definition: AI systems that interact with the physical world through a robotic body. The dominant framing for China's humanoid robot sector.
example: 具身智能是当前投资热点。

definition: Shorthand for GPU/chip-based processing capacity. 算力战 = 'compute war' (US-China chip competition).
example: 中国正在大力投资算力基础设施。

definition: Biped robots designed to resemble and operate like humans. Key physical AI segment in China.
example: 宇树科技生产人形机器人。

definition: Hangzhou-based AI lab backed by High-Flyer Quant (幻方量化). Known for cost-efficient frontier models.
example: 深度求索发布了新版大模型。

definition: Quantitative hedge fund and backer of DeepSeek. Founded by Liang Wenfeng (梁文锋).
example: 幻方量化是深度求索的母公司。

definition: Leading Chinese humanoid robot company. Private. Known for Go1, H1, G1 robot lines.
example: 宇树科技正在进行D轮融资。

definition: HKEX-listed (9880) humanoid robot company. Walker S1 deployed in automotive factories.
example: 优必选在港交所上市。

definition: Huawei's domestic AI chip series (Ascend 910B, 910C). Primary domestic alternative to NVIDIA.
example: 华为昇腾是英伟达的国内替代方案。

definition: The dominant GPU manufacturer. Critical to AI training. Subject of US export controls to China.
example: 英伟达的H100芯片受到出口限制。

definition: World's largest power grid operator (88% of China's territory). In 2026, committed 6.8B yuan to procure ~8,500 AI-powered robots across 26 regions — the largest single govt AI robot procurement in Chinese history.
example: 国家电网采购了大量人工智能机器人。

en: SAFE — State Admin. of Foreign Exchange

definition: People's Bank of China. China's central bank. Sets interest rates, manages RRR, FX reserves.
example: Key for rate/RRR cut calls. Signals matter for China fixed income + equity positioning.

definition: % of deposits banks must hold in reserve. PBOC cuts RRR to inject liquidity. Often abbreviated 准备金率.
example: Primary monetary easing lever. Watch for 25-50bps cuts as growth slows.

definition: China's chief administrative authority. Equivalent to Cabinet. Chaired by the Premier.
example: Issues major fiscal and economic policy directives.

definition: China's official statistics agency. Releases GDP, CPI, PMI, and other macro data.
example: Primary source for official macro numbers. Data credibility sometimes debated.

definition: Govt program: exchange old goods (EVs, appliances, electronics) for discounts on new. Key stimulus tool.
example: Major driver of consumer durables demand in 2025-26 cycle. Expanded to AI hardware.

definition: The real estate sector. A dominant factor in China's macro story since Evergrande crisis (2021).
example: Persistent drag on GDP. Key downside risk for China equity / credit exposure.

definition: Short for 国家补贴. Government subsidy, often for consumer goods or industrial sectors.
example: Watch 国补 programs as leading indicators of policy-driven demand cycles.

definition: One of China's largest financial conglomerates: insurance, banking, fintech. HKEX: 2318.
example: Major institutional user of AI/ML in risk and customer service.

definition: One of China's largest joint-stock commercial banks. Known for retail banking quality. HKEX: 3968.
example: Bellwether for China consumer credit quality and fintech adoption.

definition: Interest rate. 贷款利率 (lending rate), 存款利率 (deposit rate), LPR (Loan Prime Rate) are key terms.
example: LPR cuts are key monetary easing signals. Watch monthly PBOC announcements.

definition: CSRC approval allowing a firm to underwrite, broker, or advise in China's onshore capital markets. Wholly foreign-owned firms need a separate application from JVs. Citi received one in May 2026.
example: 花旗集团终于拿到了证券牌照。

definition: 100% foreign equity in a subsidiary — no required local JV partner. Available to foreign securities/AM firms in China since 2020 policy liberalization.
example: 花旗在华设立全资控股证券子公司。

definition: Major US bank. Received CSRC approval for a wholly owned China securities firm in May 2026, timed to the Trump-Xi Beijing summit after a 4-year wait. One of 7 foreign banks with this designation.
example: 花旗集团获批在华设立独资证券公司。

definition: Rate at which banks lend to each other overnight. PBOC Q1 2026 report formally elevated this as the primary liquidity management anchor — first time made explicit — signalling shift from broad RRR/rate cuts to precision tools.
example: 人民银行将隔夜利率作为新的流动性管理锚。

definition: PBOC's toolkit for managing money supply, interest rates, and credit. Current stance (Dec 2025 CEWC): 'moderately loose' (适度宽松). Q1 2026 report signals shift toward structural tools over broad-based RRR/rate cuts.
example: 央行的货币政策保持适度宽松。

definition: Founded DeepSeek from his quant fund. Key architect of China's cost-efficient AI strategy.
significance: Founded DeepSeek from his quant fund. Key architect of China's cost-efficient AI strategy.

definition: Pioneer of Chinese internet search. Pivoting Baidu to AI/autonomous driving via ERNIE Bot.
significance: Pioneer of Chinese internet search. Pivoting Baidu to AI/autonomous driving via ERNIE Bot.

definition: Founder of Huawei. Central figure in China's push for semiconductor self-sufficiency.
significance: Founder of Huawei. Central figure in China's push for semiconductor self-sufficiency.

definition: Built China's dominant food delivery/local services platform. Pivoting to AI-powered logistics.
significance: Built China's dominant food delivery/local services platform. Pivoting to AI-powered logistics.

definition: Founder of TikTok/Douyin parent. ByteDance is a major LLM and AI infrastructure investor.
significance: Founder of TikTok/Douyin parent. ByteDance is a major LLM and AI infrastructure investor.

definition: Current PBOC Governor. Key figure for monetary policy direction.
significance: Current PBOC Governor. Key figure for monetary policy direction.

definition: China's Premier. Chairs State Council. Key economic policy executor under Xi Jinping.
significance: China's Premier. Chairs State Council. Key economic policy executor under Xi Jinping.

definition: Paramount leader. Sets strategic direction on tech self-reliance, AI governance, and geopolitics.
org: 中共中央 CPC / 国家主席
significance: Paramount leader. Sets strategic direction on tech self-reliance, AI governance, and geopolitics.
